senses.gloss: someone who is blind since birth

examples.text: وَأُبْرِئُ الْأَكْمَهَ وَالْأَبْرَصَ وَأُحْيِي الْمَوْتَىٰ بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ
examples.english: I will heal the blind and the leper and raise the dead to life—by Allah’s Will.

etymology.text: Color or defect adjective from the root ك م ه (k m h).
